simple
.
.. subfigure:: AB

   .. image:: image.png
      :alt: hallo

   .. image:: image.png
      :alt: hallo
.

        <SubfigureEnvLatex width="0.495">
            <image alt="hallo" candidates="{'*': 'image.png'}" subfigure_area="A" uri="image.png">
        <SubfigureEnvLatex width="0.495">
            <image alt="hallo" candidates="{'*': 'image.png'}" subfigure_area="B" uri="image.png">
.

non-progression layout (falls back to plain figure)
.
.. subfigure:: B|A

   .. image:: image.png
      :alt: hallo

   .. image:: image.png
      :alt: hallo
.
<document source="<src>/index.rst">

        <image alt="hallo" candidates="{'*': 'image.png'}" subfigure_area="A" uri="image.png">
        <image alt="hallo" candidates="{'*': 'image.png'}" subfigure_area="B" uri="image.png">
.

empty leading area
.

   .. image:: image.png
      :alt: hallo
.
